baseColorHelper: Palette niile dị n'okpuru dabere na agba a.
colorReadError: Enweghị ike ịgụ agba ahụ. Jide n'aka na ị na-eji usoro
enterValidColor: Tinye agba HEX ziri ezi iji mepụta palette. A na-eme ọtụtụ ọgụgụ niile na ihe nchọgharị gị.

monochromatic.label: Palette otu agba
monochromatic.description: Agba niile nwere otu ụdị (H), ha na-adị iche iche karịsịa na ìhè (L) n'ime oghere agba HSL.

analogous.label: Palette yiri
analogous.description: Agba ndị nwere ụdị yiri ya — site na ihe dịka -30° ruo +30° gburugburu agba ntọala na wịịlụ agba ọdịnala (dịka nke Itten).

complementary.label: Palette mgbakwụnye
complementary.description: Agba ntọala na mgbakwụnye ya nke atụgharịrị 180° na wịịlụ agba — otu n'ime ịdị iche agba bụ isi nke Johannes Itten kọwara.

triadic.label: Palette atọ
triadic.description: Ụdị atọ nke ekewapụrụ 120° na wịịlụ agba (akụkụ nke triangle nhata) — geometry a na-ejikarị na akara na nhazi nke Bauhaus kwadoro.

splitComplementary.label: Palette mgbakwụnye kewara
splitComplementary.description: Ụdị nke palette mgbakwụnye — kama otu mgbakwụnye (180°), anyị na-eji agba abụọ nke atụgharịrị ihe dịka ±30° site na mgbakwụnye, na-ebelata ụda anya mgbe ọ na-edobe ịdị iche siri ike.

softPastel.label: Palette pastel
softPastel.description: Otu ụdị ahụ nwere mbelata saturation na mmụba ìhè — njem gaa n'etiti na elu nke oghere HSL, na-emepụta agba dị nro, 'tọ ụtọ'.

deepDark.label: Palette ojii
deepDark.description: Otu ụdị ahụ nwere saturation dị elu (S) na mbelata ìhè (L) — njem gaa n'okpuru ahịrị ìhè, na-emepụta agba miri emi nke bụ nke ụdị ojii na akara siri ike.

materialTonal.label: Palette ụda (nke Material Design kwadoro)
materialTonal.description: Ọtụtụ nzọụkwụ ìhè nke otu ụdị — L dị iche iche na S dị ntakịrị karịa, yiri nkeji ụda a maara site na ntụziaka Material Design (dịka 50-900).

appleMinimal.label: Palette dị mfe (nke Apple kwadoro)
appleMinimal.description: Otu akara agba siri ike na ọtụtụ agba ìhè dị nro na-enweghị mkpokọta — usoro dabara maka peeji nwere ọtụtụ oghere ọcha na onyinyo dị nro.
